title: Connected Hotbar
body:
Connected Hotbar

Installation • Issues • More

Removes the dividers between slots in the hotbar making it one big seamless box. _If you want a dark edition go [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/connected-hotbar-(dark))._
Compatibility
Currently: - Version 1.20.1 _should_ be compatible with most versions **before**. - Version 1.20.2 _should_ be compatible with most versions **after**. - Tested in 1.21.11 without any issues. Just ignore the incompatibility warning in the resource pack selection menu. _If there are any issues please submit it on the issues page._
